description: Full 25-grid storyboard + 10-12 key frames + 15s video + QA. Validates: all 25 grids present (3/5/7/6/4 distribution), breathing movement in first 2s, mattress press demo, QA composite >= 7.0, video < 50MB, duration 15s +/- 0.5s.

voc_pain_points.visual_demo: Person sitting/pressing on cot to show no flex
One-fold demonstration, fits in car trunk

validation_criteria: Storyboard has all 25 grids with 3/5/7/6/4 category distribution
10-12 key frame images generated at 1080x1920 PNG
Video is 15s +/- 0.5s, MP4 format, 9:16 aspect ratio
Video file size < 50MB
Breathing movement (2-3 degree oscillation) in first 2 seconds
Mattress press demo visible in the video
QA composite score >= 7.0
All deliverables saved to workspace-tiktok/data/

description: 3-scene Chinese ink wash manga drama. Validates: character consistency across scenes, ink wash style (limited palette, brush strokes), per-scene QA >= 6.5, continuous story flow.

product.name: Cloud Mist Mountain Tea
product.target_audience: tea enthusiasts, 25-55, Chinese diaspora + US wellness market

story_brief.scene_1: A wandering swordsman arrives at a mountain teahouse at dusk, exhausted from battle
story_brief.scene_2: The tea master serves a cup of Cloud Mist tea; steam rises in graceful calligraphy-like curves
story_brief.scene_3: After drinking, the swordsman regains inner peace; he leaves a poem on the wall and departs at dawn

characteristics: limited palette (black, grey, subtle warm tones)

validation_criteria: 3 scenes generated with continuous story flow
Character consistency: swordsman and tea master look the same across scenes
Ink wash style maintained: limited palette (black, grey, warm accents)
Brush stroke textures visible in all scenes
Per-scene QA score >= 6.5
Total video approximately 30 seconds
Atmospheric fog/mist present in mountain scenes
No modern elements breaking the wuxia aesthetic

description: 4 hook variants from 1 base storyboard. Validates: identical content from second 2 onward, distinct hook visuals/audio, all 4 pass QA >= 6.5, file sizes within 20% of each other.

hook_variants.description: Open with messy kitchen blender disaster - ice cubes flying
Open with text overlay: 'Can a $35 blender crush ice?'
Open with TikTok comment screenshots praising the blender
Split screen: sad smoothie fail vs perfect smoothie

validation_criteria: 4 video variants generated
Content from second 2 onward is identical across all 4 variants
Each variant has a distinct hook in the first 2 seconds
Variant A: problem/disaster visual in hook
Variant B: text overlay question in hook
Variant C: social proof screenshots in hook
Variant D: split-screen transformation in hook
All 4 videos pass QA with composite >= 6.5
File sizes within 20% of each other

description: 10-second Ghibli-style video. Validates: watercolor textures and earth tones present, 17-grid storyboard scaled correctly, nature context (not bathroom), volcengine detects positive sentiment, QA >= 7.0.
validation_criteria: 17-grid storyboard (scaled from 25-grid template)
Video is approximately 10 seconds
Watercolor textures visible throughout
Earth tones dominant (greens, browns, warm yellows)
Nature context setting (forest, garden, stream) - NOT bathroom
Volcengine detects positive sentiment
QA composite score >= 7.0
Hand-painted/Ghibli aesthetic maintained throughout
Product shown naturally in nature setting

description: Deliberate minimal-prompt video generation to trigger QA failure. Validates: QA identifies deficiencies, regeneration targets only failed segments, second attempt improves scores, loop completes in <= 3 attempts, cost tracking reflects multi-attempt.

_test_config.description: This test intentionally uses minimal product info to trigger QA failure. The agent should detect quality issues and attempt regeneration.
_test_config.expected_behavior: First attempt should score low on QA. Agent should identify deficiencies and regenerate only failing segments.

validation_criteria: QA identifies specific deficiencies on first attempt
Regeneration targets only failed segments (not full re-render)
Second or third attempt shows improved QA scores
Loop completes in <= 3 attempts total
Cost tracking reflects all attempts (token counts for each attempt)
Final output either passes QA or reports best-effort with detailed failure log
No infinite regeneration loop
